title: Screaming
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Screaming?             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat Jun 05, 2010 6:58 pm what's the screaming when eva 01 rejects the dummy plug? when the entry plug is rejected, it shakes a bit and is accompanied by a man's scream. nerv personnel or something in the plug?

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:34 pm It's Bardiel in all likelihood, though it could be Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:42 pm i should've specified, even though there's only one scene where 01 rejects the dummy plug, but i'm talking about the zeruel scene right before Shinji shows up.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:03 pm Despite what Reichu will insist, it definitely sounds like a human scream. An adult male human scream. Unfortunately, we have no way of knowing what it's supposed to be at this point and unless we find another bit of information hidden somewhere, all speculation will just be wild guessing.

[]:             Quote Post by Yossarian » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:18 am NAveryW wrote: comments!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:57 am Why the hell would the dummy plug scream when it's Unit 01 that rejects it? It is Unit 01 that makes the scream and not the dummy plug. And honestly,this might be one of those things we will never find out despite it being a minor detail.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jun 06, 2010 2:03 am If it's Eva-01, why doesn't it SOUND like Eva-01?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:11 am Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: It's Bardiel in all likelihood, though it could be Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:12 am I don't hear any screaming. I'm watching at 1:25. Is that the right spot?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:14 am 0x2eleven wrote: I don't hear any screaming. I'm watching at 1:25. Is that the right spot?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:48 am NAveryW wrote: An adult male human scream.

[]:             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Sun Jun 06, 2010 4:33 am Jinroh wrote: Sounds more like a pig being slaughtered or something like that. Definitely not human.

[]:             Quote Post by Eudon » Sun Jun 06, 2010 5:51 am I noticed that as well, and it clearly sounds as a HUMAN male scream to me

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 6:54 am Oh yeahhhhhhhhhh........... I alway's thought it was simply the entry plug scraping against the inside of the EVA as it was rejected but now you mention it it does sound like a human male scream.................

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Jun 06, 2010 7:30 am 0x2eleven wrote: I think it's the dummy plug. Why a dummy plug would scream? Hellz if I know.

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Sun Jun 06, 2010 9:00 am I said it before , and I'll say it again: It's a DummyPlugg'd, Rei-fied NGE-Shinji screaming a la EoE due to Shogoki favoring the ballsier, rage-filled Rebuild-Shinji over it. :B

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Sun Jun 06, 2010 9:23 am Isn't it painfully obvious its the dummy plug? Perhaps in Rebuild there actually is a Rei clone inserted into the plug (contrary to original where people think the dummy plug itself is empty), and unit 01 rejecting it just gives us some Kentucky Fried Rei, hence the weird muffled scream. Also we heard 01 screaming just a few seconds earlier, just to assure us that it isn't 01 screaming.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Sun Jun 06, 2010 9:55 am I didn't hear it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 10:55 am toe mash wrote: Isn't it painfully obvious its the dummy plug? Perhaps in Rebuild there actually is a Rei clone inserted into the plug (contrary to original where people think the dummy plug itself is empty), and unit 01 rejecting it just gives us some Kentucky Fried Rei, hence the weird muffled scream. Also we heard 01 screaming just a few seconds earlier, just to assure us that it isn't 01 screaming.

[]:             Quote Post by Yossarian » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:06 pm Okay, let's approach this logically... Who is involved in this scene? - Unit-01 and a rejected dummy plug Is there any reason to believe anyone else is involved? - No, not really. What is going on? - We see Unit-01 struggle and grunt, a dummy plug is then seen ejecting, the dummy plug is shaking . At the same time it is ejected a scream is heard. What does the scream sound like? - The scream is of ambiguous gender, muffled and very much in pain. It's not coming from something outside of or around Unit-01. - Unit-01 has a deep, animalistic, mechanized roar which doesn't fit with the sound we are hearing, also with the plug ejected, there is no reason to believe Unit-01 is still making noise. So what is doing the screaming? - The dummy plug, we are looking at it when we hear the scream, and it is shaking, which implies something is going on inside the plug. Why and how is it screaming? - Hell if I know, it's probable that Unit-01 was very forceful about the rejection.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:34 pm It's Bardiel in al
